events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the staged fixture's rating/nameplate marking is turned away and unverified against the drawing's specified size/class, the correct call is `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than an outright fail — the material itself isn't confirmed defective, but installation can't be approved under NEC 410 / 110.3(B) until the listing is verified to match the drawing requirement.
